subject: Ascending sparkline silhouette tracing the trends-tracker score climb for the GMK CYL OG Extensions interest check, from 5 to 55 over eight weekly readings. Under-curve wash + weekly reading dots that brighten toward the current (focal) point, per the trends-piece sparkline-silhouette house style.
stroke_weight: 2px (sparkline itself rendered at 3px for legibility as the focal motif)
data_sources: data/trends/2026-W29.json — "GMK CYL OG Extensions": spark [5, 10, 18, 26, 34, 42, 49, 55], note: "New '[IC] GMK CYL OG Extensions' interest check posted on Geekhack with a GB window of July 15-Aug 12, 2026, generating fresh keycap-community buzz."

design_notes.motif: abstract ascending sparkline, not a literal chart-with-axes — no numeral labels, no plotted axis lines beyond one faint dashed baseline
design_notes.point_mapping: y = 620 - (score - 5) / 50 * 420, x evenly spaced 140..1060 across 8 weekly readings
design_notes.focal_point: final reading (score 55) at (1060, 200) — larger dot + halo ring, marks current momentum
design_notes.wash_technique: low-opacity terracotta ellipse behind the peak zone + low-opacity fill under the polyline, same family technique as dcs-grass-valley-decline.svg's focal ellipse wash
design_notes.theme_dot_position: cx=1148 cy=88 r=9, with two satellite micro-dots (bronze + terracotta) for family cohesion
